allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: SafeCoder workflow setup

Changes made:
- Created SafeCoder skill in .claude/skills/safecoder.md
- Added CLAUDE.md with project-specific workflow rules
- Added pre-commit hook to prevent commits to main/master
- Configured comprehensive clarifying questions phase

Explanation:
This establishes the SafeCoder workflow system that guides engineers
through structured development with feature branches, detailed planning,
milestone-based commits, and comprehensive documentation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git merge feature/requirements-workflow --no-ff -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge feature/requirements-workflow into main

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git merge feature/rewrite-skills --no-ff -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Merge feature/rewrite-skills into main

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
